title: Doobawow New!
description: Doobawow New! is a vanilla feeling mod that adds various different things to the game but keeps it vanilla.
body:
Doobawow New! is a vanilla feeling mod that adds various different things to the game.

You can find new ores, gear, mobs, and more! Doobawow New! contains overpowered swords and items to survive the night and rare ores to keep you mining!

Doobawow New! is no longer being worked on. There will be no more updates as of now.
